results.title: Search Tour

bugs.title: Automated test unable to start due to missing URL input
bugs.description: The automated test is stuck in a loop, repeatedly asking for a URL to begin the test and not proceeding. It has asked for the URL multiple times, as evidenced by the repeated "For context:[navigator] said: I am still waiting for the URL to begin the automated test. Please provide the URL." messages.
bugs.expected: The automated test should begin after a URL is provided, or provide a clear and actionable reason for not proceeding.
bugs.actual: The automated test continuously requests a URL and does not initiate, despite multiple prompts.

results.agentOutput: I have recorded a bug regarding the automated test's inability to start without a URL. The bug ID is BUG-1770865361115.

results.title: Search Car Rental

bugs.title: Cart displays '0' after adding an item
bugs.description: After successfully searching for an item ("laptop"), clicking on a specific product ("acer Nitro V Gaming Laptop"), and attempting to add it to the cart (as indicated by the navigator's summary), the cart icon at the top of the page still displays '0'.
bugs.expected: The cart icon should display '1' (or the correct number of items added) after successfully adding an item to the cart.
bugs.actual: The cart icon displays '0' after an item was supposedly added to the cart.

results.agentOutput: The automated test found a bug: after adding an item to the cart, the cart icon incorrectly displays '0' instead of '1'. I have recorded this as a high-severity functional bug.
